concept.core_loop: drag to swap two adjacent gems to line up 3+ of a color; matches clear, the board cascades down and refills, and chained clears build a combo multiplier; race a timer bar that drains continuously and tops up on every match; difficulty: the drain rate steps up every ~20s so survival demands bigger combos over time
mechanics: drag or swipe to swap two adjacent gems
reject swaps that make no match (swap back)
match-3+ detection across rows and columns
gravity: gems fall to fill gaps, new gems spawn at top
cascade chains (auto-resolve new matches after a fall)
timer bar that drains over time and refills a bit per match
game over when the timer empties
concept.art_direction: flat jewel palette on deep indigo (#141026); 5 colorblind-distinct gems each a different rounded shape (circle, square, diamond, triangle, hexagon) in cyan/magenta/lime/amber/violet; soft glow halo behind each gem; the selected gem pulses; matched gems pop with a scale-up + particle burst + brief white flash; combo counter pulses and a screen-edge flash fires on a 4+ chain; subtle vertical gradient background with slow-drifting bokeh dots so there is no dead space; readable score top-left and a timer bar across the top
concept.differentiation_notes: timer top-up tension (continuous drain you replenish by matching) plus cascade combo multipliers that reward chaining, instead of the usual static move-limited match-3
